name: IOption<T>
summary: Object that either contains a single value, or is empty.

methods.name: Bind(System.Func<T, Dynamo.Utilities.IOption<U>>)
methods.summary: If the IOption(T) instance contains a value, project the value into a new IOption(U) instance using the given function. Otherwise, propagate the empty option.

params.name: selector
params.doc: Function used to project a value.

methods.name: Match(System.Func<T, U>, System.Func<U>)
methods.signature: U Match<U>(System.Func<T, U> someCase, System.Func<U> noneCase)
methods.summary: Produces a new value of type U using one of the given functions, based on whether the IOption(T) contains a value or not.

params.name: someCase
params.doc: Function used to create a result from a value.

params.name: noneCase
params.doc: Function used to create a result from no value.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: Attempts to get a contained value.
